title: ImageScreening
description: collection → analysis gate: which collected ad images are kept and which were dropped (with reason). Two producers write this shape: (1) the HUMAN keep/delete review (reason user_removed) — the first-pass quality/fit cut, fast and cheap; (2) the deterministic screen-images.mjs pass (reason broken_or_empty | duplicate) that runs AFTER the human, on the survivors. Every collected image is accounted for; nothing dropped silently.

total.description: must equal kept.length + dropped.length — no silent omission

kept.description: image_file paths that proceed to analysis

reason.description: concrete one-line reason from the allowed set
